title: Talent Appearance Release
purpose: Authorize Spotlight Advocate to record and use a talent's likeness.
scope: Applies to individuals appearing on camera in Spotlight Advocate productions.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.body: Authorize Spotlight Advocate to record and use a talent's likeness.

sections.heading: Scope
sections.body: Applies to individuals appearing on camera in Spotlight Advocate productions.

sections.heading: Consent
sections.body: Talent consents to being photographed and recorded.

sections.heading: Use
sections.body: Materials may be used for promotional and commercial purposes.

revision_history.author: Spotlight Advocate
revision_history.notes: Assembled Purpose/Scope as leading body components (standard order).
